items.title: Critical vulnerability in Amasty extension leading to remote code execution
items.summary: Amasty issued a massive security release for 25 extensions, with one critical vulnerability that can lead to remote code execution. Sansec Shield already blocks the critical issues.

items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes (CVE-2026-53787) allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, opening the door to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento full-page cache extension, allowing remote code execution via a crafted cookie. This flaw is actively exploited and has been added to CISA's KEV catalog.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: Sansec discovered PolyShell, a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that enables unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image. Mass exploitation attempts have been observed.

items.title: Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: Adobe released a critical security update resolving multiple vulnerabilities that could lead to security feature bypass, application denial-of-service, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read. Adobe recommends applying the patches immediately.
